body:

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjM5MTY2MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNDA2ODE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM5MTY2MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNDA2ODE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
[**https://www.hillaryclinton.com/dinner-with-hillary/**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjM5MTY2MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNDA2ODE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

**No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** UPDATED:Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 11/01/15 and 12/31/15. Enter by contributing **[here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjM5MTY2MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNDA2ODE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)** or click **[here**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjM5MTY2MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNDA2ODE1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. One Winner and a guest will receive(1) a special invitation to a campaign dinner event with Hillary Clinton, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the campaign event and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1900). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to **[Official Rules**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjM5MTY2MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNDA2ODE1S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjM5MTY2MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNDA2ODE1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM5MTY2MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNDA2ODE1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM5MTY2MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNDA2ODE1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM5MTY2MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNDA2ODE1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjM5MTY2MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNDA2ODE1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM5MTY2MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwNDA2ODE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Jessica Ennis, MarcoRubio.com
subject: now it’s official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://mail.teamrubio.marcorubio.com/ct/44756662:Jc7TzKLvN:m:1:1349778030:837FB13BA0D00E0CC4DBCD69ABF6FBD3:r)
---
| | | | Peter, Exciting news: Marco is officially on the ballot for New Hampshire's First in the Nation presidential primary! Across the country, Marco is building support for our campaign and in New Hampshire, the crowds are getting larger with each return visit. It's a great sign of things to come. **[Click here to donate $10 right now to celebrate Marco's name officially going on the ballot for the first Republican Presidential Primary.](http://mail.teamrubio.marcorubio.com/ct/44756663:Jc7TzKLvN:m:1:1349778030:837FB13BA0D00E0CC4DBCD69ABF6FBD3:r)** Getting on the ballot is the easy part. Marco has made an awesome impression on crowds in New Hampshire so far: in Nashua this week, and in Derry and Portsmouth a couple weeks ago. But the hard work is on us to ensure that voters turnout in February to cast their vote for Marco as our next President. Especially in a state like New Hampshire, winning demands lots of hard work in organizing and outreach. We're running our operation all across the country on a shoestring budget, but the costs add up -- hiring field staffers, renting offices, organizing volunteers, etc. So if you like what you've been seeing from Marco lately and want the success to grow, [**click here to chip in $10 to lend your help.**](http://mail.teamrubio.marcorubio.com/ct/44756663:Jc7TzKLvN:m:1:1349778030:837FB13BA0D00E0CC4DBCD69ABF6FBD3:r) Marco and our entire team are relying on your support to win! Sincerely, Jessica EnnisPolitical DirectorMarco Rubio for President
---
| | [**Donate** ](http://mail.teamrubio.marcorubio.com/ct/44756663:Jc7TzKLvN:m:1:1349778030:837FB13BA0D00E0CC4DBCD69ABF6FBD3:r)
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

name: Rand Paul
subject: Remember, remember. . .
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Supporter:

"Remember, remember the 5th of November."

If you've ever seen the movie _V for Vendetta_ , you know that's the central tagline used by the revolutionaries who are fighting their oppressive government.

Today, my grassroots supporters all over the country are throwing a massive "5th of November" Money Bomb for my campaign.

**[Will you join in with your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31457126:sGqYoTyNr:m:1:879035888:1ABF9FFD4EF8E441BE2448615D9CD7B3:r)**?

Will you help me give the national media and political establishment of BOTH parties something to remember this 5th of November?

Look to Washington, D.C. today, and it's not hard to see why so many Americans are angry.

We vote for politicians who promise to secure our borders and get nothing.

We vote for politicians who promise to "fight President Obama" and get more smoky backroom deals.

We vote for politicians who promise to undo ObamaCare, while voting to keep this train wreck rambling on.

BOTH parties are to blame.

BOTH parties seem more intent on spending us into oblivion and spying on our every move than keeping their campaign promises.

Supporter, it's time the American people took their country back from the Washington Machine.

That means kicking out the career politicians by imposing term limits. It means forcing Congress to read the bills they RAM into law.

It means cutting taxes to ensure we whittle Washington, D.C. down to size.

It means enforcing the Bill of Rights and telling BOTH parties "hands off our liberties!"

New polls show my campaign is positioned in the top third of the Republican field.

My ground game is unmatched, and energy is sky-high.

Will you help me capitalize on my momentum?

Will you help me send a LOUD-AND-CLEAR message that resonates from coast-to-coast that we are willing to do whatever it takes to finally get our out-of-control federal government off our backs!

**[Will you contribute $20.16 or more today to help me ensure the Washington Machine has something to remember this November 5th](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31457126:sGqYoTyNr:m:1:879035888:1ABF9FFD4EF8E441BE2448615D9CD7B3:r)**?

I'm counting on you, Supporter.

Please act at once.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31457127:sGqYoTyNr:m:1:879035888:1ABF9FFD4EF8E441BE2448615D9CD7B3:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31457128:sGqYoTyNr:m:1:879035888:1ABF9FFD4EF8E441BE2448615D9CD7B3:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31457129:sGqYoTyNr:m:1:879035888:1ABF9FFD4EF8E441BE2448615D9CD7B3:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31457130:sGqYoTyNr:m:1:879035888:1ABF9FFD4EF8E441BE2448615D9CD7B3:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31457126:sGqYoTyNr:m:1:879035888:1ABF9FFD4EF8E441BE2448615D9CD7B3:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31457131:sGqYoTyNr:m:1:879035888:1ABF9FFD4EF8E441BE2448615D9CD7B3:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31457132:sGqYoTyNr:m:1:879035888:1ABF9FFD4EF8E441BE2448615D9CD7B3:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31457133:sGqYoTyNr:m:1:879035888:1ABF9FFD4EF8E441BE2448615D9CD7B3:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Team Carson
subject: A small token of our appreciation...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31458304:sW3yvTyN4:m:1:876315805:F96EC9F1F81C73B8B1896DCD0EBABAC7:r)
---

Peter,

It's hard to put into words how much we appreciate your support of Ben and your involvement in this movement to revive America.

As a small token of our appreciation, we'd like to share a special song with you called "This is America."

It was written for our campaign by country music artist and TV personality Justin Tranchita.

[**You can listen to it now by visiting BenCarson.com/Song.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31458304:sW3yvTyN4:m:1:876315805:F96EC9F1F81C73B8B1896DCD0EBABAC7:r)

Thank you, and we hope you enjoy it.

\- Team Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31458305:sW3yvTyN4:m:1:876315805:F96EC9F1F81C73B8B1896DCD0EBABAC7:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31458306:sW3yvTyN4:m:1:876315805:F96EC9F1F81C73B8B1896DCD0EBABAC7:r)

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: new poll: in the top 5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Supporter,

For the second time in recent days, a brand new poll confirms our growing grassroots momentum.

Despite the media going all-out to dismiss my campaign, the most recent Fox News Poll shows I've caught up and tied Jeb Bush for 5th place in a crowded 15-person field \-- _and I'm within the margin of error for 3rd place_.

My stand against the debt ceiling increase -- which was watched by over 23 million Facebook viewers -- proves that my message of shrinking the size of government and opposing any budget that is not balanced is resonating with the American public.

That's why my campaign is teaming up with the grassroots and their "5th of November" Money Bomb today to build on this momentum -- **[and I hope you'll help make this a massive success by chipping in your most generous contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31462990:WIIoaTy1N:m:1:879035888:6F44F1ACD7D8AB6A63E062D8732D5A01:r)**.

Supporter, my campaign is by far the most efficient and fiscally responsible among all the candidates.

Jeb Bush and his Super PACs have reportedly raised over $100 million and have already spent tens of millions of dollars, yet he is falling in the polls while I'm rising.

With Hillary Clinton and the GOP establishment's handpicked candidates floundering, the media would rather turn the race for the Republican nomination into a personality contest than one about issues.

But I refuse to back down. And I hope you'll continue to stand with me.

Unlike some of my opponents, I'm not beholden to the fat-cat billionaires and lobbyists who expect free handouts and favors.

My campaign is powered by hundreds of thousands of grassroots patriots, just like you, across the country.

**[That's why I'm counting on you to please help me build on our growing momentum by making your most generous contribution to"5th of November" Money Bomb TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31462990:WIIoaTy1N:m:1:879035888:6F44F1ACD7D8AB6A63E062D8732D5A01:r)**!

Thank you in advance for your continued support.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31462991:WIIoaTy1N:m:1:879035888:6F44F1ACD7D8AB6A63E062D8732D5A01:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31462992:WIIoaTy1N:m:1:879035888:6F44F1ACD7D8AB6A63E062D8732D5A01:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31462993:WIIoaTy1N:m:1:879035888:6F44F1ACD7D8AB6A63E062D8732D5A01:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31462994:WIIoaTy1N:m:1:879035888:6F44F1ACD7D8AB6A63E062D8732D5A01:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31462990:WIIoaTy1N:m:1:879035888:6F44F1ACD7D8AB6A63E062D8732D5A01:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31462990:WIIoaTy1N:m:1:879035888:6F44F1ACD7D8AB6A63E062D8732D5A01:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31462995:WIIoaTy1N:m:1:879035888:6F44F1ACD7D8AB6A63E062D8732D5A01:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31462996:WIIoaTy1N:m:1:879035888:6F44F1ACD7D8AB6A63E062D8732D5A01:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31462997:WIIoaTy1N:m:1:879035888:6F44F1ACD7D8AB6A63E062D8732D5A01:r)

name: Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager
subject: The ground game
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, we were excited to announce a new staff hire in New Hampshire today. Andy Leach is a veteran N.H. operative and previously worked for Gov. Scott Walker's campaign. [Read more here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31465356:sEqFMTyNt:m:1:958431888:D96F883588CF330EEC6F971167C94039:r).

We also gained the support of New Hampshire State Rep. Robert Rowe, a former Jeb Bush supporter. [Read more here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31465357:sEqFMTyNt:m:1:958431888:D96F883588CF330EEC6F971167C94039:r).

**[Ever wonder where those dollars are spent when supporters chip in with a generous contribution to help?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31465358:sEqFMTyNt:m:1:958431888:D96F883588CF330EEC6F971167C94039:r)**

**We have an incredibly strong ground game - Here are some recent grassroots milestones:**

• This week, our volunteer teams have been working hard in Virginia to collect the required 5,000 signatures to get John Kasich's name on the GOP primary ballot.

• On Monday, our team filed to get Gov. Kasich on the Arkansas GOP primary ballot and on Tuesday, Gov. Kasich was joined in Alabama by Gov. Robert Bentley & Secretary of State John Merrill as he filed paperwork to appear on the GOP primary ballot.

• Tomorrow, Gov. Kasich will sign paperwork to appear on the New Hampshire GOP primary ballot.

• We've also been the first GOP candidate to file for the ballot in Nevada, Maine, Alaska and Kansas.

Presidential campaigns are won on the ground and our grassroots team is second to none.**

America needs John Kasich's leadership **[**and with your help to keep up this momentum**](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31465358:sEqFMTyNt:m:1:958431888:D96F883588CF330EEC6F971167C94039:r), we can win the primary and go on to defeat Hillary!

Sincerely,

**Beth Hansen
**Campaign Manager
[JohnKasich.com
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31465359:sEqFMTyNt:m:1:958431888:D96F883588CF330EEC6F971167C94039:r)

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31465358:sEqFMTyNt:m:1:958431888:D96F883588CF330EEC6F971167C94039:r)

P.S. Tune in Friday evening - Gov. Kasich will be on CBS' The Late Show with Stephen Colbert! You can help us by sharing the image below on Facebook:
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31465360:sEqFMTyNt:m:1:958431888:D96F883588CF330EEC6F971167C94039:r)
Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://email.sermodigital.com/p/isEqFMTyNt). [Update your preferences](http://email.sermodigital.com/p/osEqFMTyNt)

name: Rick Santorum
subject: Obama is chicken
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend --
President Obama is chicken!

Yeah, I said it... because someone had to!

I’ve dealt with the liberal mainstream media for years. They hate us!

But last week’s CNBC debate was a joke and everyone knows it!

Now President Obama mocks us – CONSERVATIVES \- for standing up to CNBC? Give me a break! He doesn’t have the guts to appear with Sean Hannity or Mark Levin, let alone take on radical world leaders!

I’ve taken on the ladies of The View. I’ve gone toe-to-toe with Bill Maher. And I’ve debated Rachel Maddow and won.

More importantly, I’ve taken on ISIS and Iran. They know who I am and I know who they are!

We need a President ready to stand up to the forces that want to undermine what makes America great and I have the track record of doing just that! But I need your help!

**[Can I count on you for a generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, or even $100 today to help us fight back?](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/contribute?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chicken&n=1)**

You have been there for me so many times before, but our campaign needs your support now more than ever. Can I count on you again?

America needs a fighter in the White House, a fighter who will take on the liberal elite and win. Join us today!

God bless,
Rick Santorum

---
Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so if you have any thoughts on anything at all, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contact?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chicken&n=2) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chicken&n=3) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ffacebook.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chicken&n=4), [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chicken&n=5), or [Instagram](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Finstagram.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chicken&n=6).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help us reclaim the American Dream for hardworking families.**

Santorum for President 2016, PO Box 238, Verona, PA 15147

[Privacy Policy](http://www.ricksantorum.com/privacy?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=chicken&n=7)

name: Ron Paul
subject: Launch a revolution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

November 5th launched a revolution for me.

Let's make it launch a comeback for Rand.

We all know the media tries to black him out.

But he is breaking through.

The video of his fiery speech against raising the debt limit went viral last week with over 22 million views.

We aren't going to let the media decide this.

But even in their biased polls, he is tied for fifth.

Now, he needs your help and money will be key.

**[So please click here to watch my special message and then help Rand by chipping in $20.16 to his campaign right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31467483:Wjg2XTydN:m:1:879035888:05091D9262E310C98BA47466D99BE240:r)**.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: [Last chance] Donate anything and get my book
body:
#
Dear Brothers and Sisters,
**When you're an outsider, sometimes you have to try something a little crazy to break in.** Yesterday I did something that I wasn't sure would work -- I made an offer that for a limited time, a new contribution to our campaign would get you a copy of my book, _Outsider in the White House_.
And wow, did it work. So I'm extending the offer today. [**Make any donation to our campaign and I'll send you a copy of my book _Outsider in the White House._ The average contribution for the book is $27.44.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb272d/43f17890/53b1ed2d/621eda3d/249880743/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernies_book?refcode=em151105out-full")
I readily accept the label of "outsider." I was an outsider when I first ran for office in Vermont, and I certainly started as an outsider when I announced I would run for president.
But the majority of Americans today are outsiders, too. We are outsiders in the halls of power where decisions about our economy are made. And we will remain outsiders for as long as the political balance is tipped against most Americans.
About two decades ago, I wrote a book titled _Outsider in the House_ about how we used the authority extended from my electoral victories to make changes for the better in the lives of people who don't have many allies in positions of power. I've updated the book to talk a bit about our campaign for president and want to make sure as many people as possible can read it.
[**For a limited time only, make any contribution to our campaign and you'll get a copy of my updated book,_Outsider in the White House_. Click here to make any contribution now -- the average contribution people make for the book is $27.44.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb272d/43f17890/53b1ed2d/621eda3d/249880743/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernies_book?refcode=em151105out-full")
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb272d/43f17890/53b1ed2d/621eda3d/249880743/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernies_book?refcode=em151105out-full")
There will be some folks who might only be able to afford to contribute a lot less than the book cost us, and that's fine. I want them to read the book. There might even be some people who contribute $1 because they want to cost our campaign money. So be it -- I hope they enjoy the book too.
**But if you can contribute more, we would appreciate it. You'll help defray the cost of the book for others, and help power our campaign at the same time.**
This book is important because my decision to run for president was inspired by the events outlined in it. If you really want to understand what this campaign is about and how we will leverage our political revolution to create real change after I'm elected, then you should read it.
Movements begin on the outside, and build pressure to change the inside. You're helping build this movement of outsiders -- and your support can help put this outsider in the White House.
[**For a limited time only, make any contribution to our campaign and you'll get a copy of my book. Click here to make any contribution now.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb272d/43f17890/53b1ed2d/621eda3d/249880743/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernies_book?refcode=em151105out-full")
From one outsider to another, thank you.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb272d/43f17890/53b1ed2d/621eda3d/249880743/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernies_book?refcode=em151105out-full")

** **
Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb272d/43f17890/53b1ed2d/621eda3a/249880743/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb272d/43f17890/53b1ed2d/621eda3b/249880743/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb272d/43f17890/53b1ed2d/621eda38/249880743/VEsO/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb272d/43f17890/53b1ed2d/621eda39/249880743/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
